title: Create Accordion Component for How To Play Section
description: Build a reusable Accordion component using Framer Motion for smooth expand/collapse animations. Component will support collapsed-by-default state and programmatic control via button trigger.
acceptanceCriteria: Implements expand/collapse functionality with Framer Motion
Accepts trigger button as prop or uses default
Glassmorphism styling consistent with design system
ARIA attributes for screen readers (aria-expanded, aria-controls)
technicalNotes: Use Framer Motion's motion.div with initial, animate, exit variants
Implement auto height animation with overflow: hidden
Consider using useRef for measuring content height
Add transition easing that matches existing animations
testingStrategy: Unit tests: verify expand/collapse logic. Integration tests: test with different content heights. Accessibility tests: keyboard navigation and screen readers. Animation tests: verify smooth transitions.
rollbackPlan: Remove component if animation performance issues arise
